mapper.insert: INSERT INTO web_push_subscription (endpoint, member_id, p256dh, auth) VALUES (#{endpoint}, #{member_id}, #{p256dh}, #{auth}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = #{member_id}, p256dh = #{p256dh}, auth = #{auth}
mapper.select: SELECT s.endpoint, s.p256dh, s.auth, f.ingredient_name AS ingredientName, f.expire_date AS expireDate, f.member_id AS member_id FROM fridge_item f INNER JOIN web_push_subscription s ON f.member_id = s.member_id WHERE f.expire_date = CURDATE() + INTERVAL #{daysLeft} DAY
